content: KATSEYE: WILD HEARTS in cinemas worldwide with limited screenings from August 12. tickets now on sale at http://katseyewildheartsfilm.com/ Two-time GRAMMY®-nominated global girl group KATSEYE is coming to cinemas worldwide with a special theatrical release ahead of their third EP, WILD. KATSEYE: WILD HEARTS is a captivating journey into the group's bold new era while celebrating the fans who helped make it possible. Featuring never-before-seen footage, EYEKONS fan videos, and intimate interviews from the group members, the film explores the powerful bond between KATSEYE and their global fandom. A love letter to the EYEKONS who helped build this movement, KATSEYE: WILD HEARTS reveals why this group's story is only just beginning. From the intense pressure of Dream Academy to chart-topping viral success, audiences experience the highs, setbacks, sacrifices, and breakthrough moments that transformed KATSEYE on their path to global pop stardom. Praised by outlets including The New York Times, Vogue, Rolling Stone, and Billboard, KATSEYE has earned acclaim for their relentless dedication to their craft and electrifying live performances. As one of pop's most exciting emerging global acts, the group continues to solidify its place as a worldwide force. From the same team that created Netflix’s POP STAR ACADEMY, KATSEYE: WILD HEARTS is produced by Interscope Films and Boardwalk Pictures, in partnership with HYBE X GEFFEN, and directed by Nadia Hallgren.

chineseContent: 《KATSEYE: WILD HEARTS》将于 8 月 12 日起在全球影院进行有限放映。门票现已在 http://katseyewildheartsfilm.com/ 发售。两次获得格莱美®提名的全球女子组合 KATSEYE 将在其第三张 EP《WILD》之前在全球影院上映特别影院。 KATSEYE: WILD HEARTS 是一次进入该乐队大胆新时代的迷人旅程，同时向那些帮助实现这一目标的粉丝们致敬。影片以前所未见的镜头、EYEKONS 粉丝视频以及乐队成员的亲密采访为特色，探讨了 KATSEYE 与其全球粉丝之间的强大联系。 《KATSEYE: WILD HEARTS》是一封写给帮助发起这一运动的 EYEKONS 的情书，揭示了为什么这个团体的故事才刚刚开始。从《梦想学院》的巨大压力到排行榜上的病毒式成功，观众们体验到了 KATSEYE 走向全球流行巨星之路上的高潮、挫折、牺牲和突破时刻。 KATSEYE 受到《纽约时报》、《Vogue》、《滚石》和《Billboard》等媒体的赞扬，因其对工艺的不懈奉献和激动人心的现场表演而赢得赞誉。作为流行乐界最令人兴奋的新兴全球乐队之一，该乐队继续巩固其作为全球力量的地位。 《KATSEYE: WILD HEARTS》出自 Netflix POP STAR ACADEMY 的同一团队，由 Interscope Films 和 Boardwalk Pictures 与 HYBE X GEFFEN 合作制作，由 Nadia Hallgren 执导。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
